I work in data annotation and LLM evaluation, and build real full-stack projects on the side. This page covers the three I can show today, with data, stack, and current status for each.
Projects

Client Management & Analytics Dashboard — Maestro Pilates

Freelance · In use

Client survey system for a Pilates studio (imports clients and classes, generates per-client surveys) and admin dashboard, co-built with another developer. I designed and built the Analytics module on my own.

Next.js · TypeScript · Supabase · Tailwind CSS
Access is login-protected — source is private due to client confidentiality.

Inventory Management System — Hotel Berns (Sweden)

Live

App for tracking a real hotel's monthly stock: inventory counts by container, product catalog, month-to-month history, and a dashboard that splits raw materials from finished products.

Next.js · TypeScript · Supabase · Tailwind CSS · Chart.js Code

Hospital Readmission Analysis — Diabetes (US)

Published

Exploratory analysis of 99,492 hospital records across 130 US hospitals. Found readmission patterns by age group, insulin use, and length of stay.

Python · EDA · HTML/CSS/JS View dashboard
